overall.description: A smooth drone flight in Microsoft Flight Simulator beginning over calm coastal waters and approaching the Casino de Ibiza. The camera transitions from water to beach, then tracks along the modern glass and concrete casino building, passing landscaped vegetation. The footage features bright tropical lighting and empty beachfront areas.

agents.ego_description: flying low over calm water toward the distant shoreline with the casino visible in the distance

entered.detail: calm reflective ocean water with gentle ripples
sandy shore with low-rise buildings and hills in the background
fluffy white clouds scattered across blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a low-altitude drone flight over calm coastal waters. The camera moves steadily forward toward a distant shoreline where the Casino de Ibiza is visible, with clear blue skies and bright sunlight reflecting off the water surface.

events.description: camera transitions from flying over water to flying over sandy beach

agents.ego_description: flying over the beach toward the casino building complex, maintaining low altitude

entered.detail: light-colored sand with wet patches near the waterline
large beige modern building with flat roof and glass sections
green tropical trees lining the edge of the beach

segments.scene_description: The drone moves from water onto a sandy beach, approaching the casino building. The beach is empty and wide, with tropical trees visible on the left side. The casino building becomes more prominent as the camera advances across the sand.

events.description: text overlay 'CASINO DE IBIZA' appears briefly on screen

agents.ego_description: flying along the side of the casino building at low altitude, parallel to the facade

entered.detail: asphalt and concrete paved area with patches and stains
reflective glass windows and doors on the casino building
dark red circular stains on the pavement

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto a paved plaza running alongside the casino, with the modern glass facade dominating the right side of the frame. The text 'CASINO DE IBIZA' appears briefly. The ground shows asphalt with some red stains, and the building features large reflective windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: landscaped path with trees alongside casino

agents.ego_description: continuing along the building past the main entrance, with landscaped vegetation on the left

entered.detail: mature trees with spreading canopies providing dappled shade
white and yellow flowers growing in patches on the left side
darker gravel and dirt path replacing the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the drone flying along a landscaped path with the casino building still on the right and mature trees with flowering plants on the left. The lighting becomes slightly diffused by tree shadows, and the ground transitions to gravel and dirt as the camera continues past the building entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drone flight that transitions from a serene coastal approach into a detailed exploration of the modern Casino de Ibiza. It begins with a low-altitude glide over calm, sun-drenched waters, moving steadily toward a distant shoreline under clear blue skies. As the camera crosses the threshold from water to land, it sweeps across a wide, empty sandy beach flanked by tropical trees before approaching the main structure. The scene then shifts onto a paved plaza where the modern glass facade and the Casino de Ibiza signage dominate the view, with the camera tracking along reflective windows and asphalt. Finally, the movement carries the drone onto a landscaped path, passing under the dappled shadows of flowering trees as the ground transitions to gravel and dirt beyond the building entrance.
